title: Enterprise Compliance AI Agents Platform
description: Enterprise-grade multi-agent AI platform for financial fraud detection and regulatory compliance built using Azure AI Foundry and Databricks Lakehouse.
long_description: This project demonstrates how enterprise organizations can automate financial compliance workflows using AI agents. The platform analyzes financial transactions, detects fraud risks, generates compliance reports, and triggers fraud alerts. Azure AI Foundry powers the decision-making agents while Databricks Lakehouse provides scalable data processing and analytics.

architecture.description: Architecture showing multi-agent orchestration powered by Azure AI Foundry with Databricks Lakehouse for fraud data analysis.

demo.description: Interactive AI agent demo will be available soon.
